nvim.title: Neovim command
nvim.description: The Neovim executable or frontend to use. GUI frontends should include `--` after the command, e.g. `nvim-qt --`.

runInTerminal.label: Run in terminal
runInTerminal.description: Whether to run the command in a terminal emulator. Should be checked when using plain text-based nvim, and unchecked when using a GUI frontend.

sessionDir.label: Session file directory
sessionDir.description: Location where Neovim session files are stored
sessionDir.title: Select a session file directory

includeInSearch.label: Include in main search
includeInSearch.description: Whether to include Neovim sessions in the main launcher search results

error.title: Neovim sessions not loaded
error.description: Check your log for error messages
